attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 ST_EX.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
,ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME
,ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID
,ADJUSTMENT_ID
,BATCH_SOURCE
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,CURRENCY_CODE
/*,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID*/
,COALESCE(ST_EX.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID /*CHANGED AS PART OF ACCRUALS FIX*/
,DIST_BAL_TYPE
,DISTRIBUTION_TYPE
,ST_EX.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN ST_EX.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' THEN 1 WHEN ST_EX.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' THEN -1 ELSE 0 END ) as DV_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT

,ST_EX.AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN ST_EX.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' THEN 1 WHEN ST_EX.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' THEN -1 ELSE 0 END ) as DV_AMOUNT
				 
,abs(ST_EX.PERCENT_ADJ) * ( CASE WHEN ST_EX.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' THEN 1 WHEN ST_EX.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' THEN -1 else 0 end ) as DV_PERCENT
,EVENT_ID
,GL_DATE
,GL_POSTED_DATE
,GL_POSTED_FLAG
,ST_EX.LEDGER_ID
,LINE_ID
,CASE WHEN ST_EX.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5 IN ('NRS SSPTP Transition Release', 'NRS_MPOB_TRANS') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,OA_SKU_TYPE
,ORG_ID
,ROL_TRANSACTION_ID
,SOURCE_BATCH_NAME
,SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
,COALESCE(ST_EX.TSV_FLAG,'N') as TSV_FLAG
,CASE WHEN ST_EX.OA_SKU_TYPE= 'SUB' THEN ST_EX.UNIQUE_ID ELSE ST_EX.LINE_ID END as TSV_LINE_REF_NUM
,UNIQUE_ID
,CASE WHEN ST_EX.OA_SKU_TYPE= 'SUB' AND NRA.ASSOCIATION_TYPE = 'TRANSACTION_LINE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as XAAS_OFFER_ATTRIB_FLG
,COALESCE(ST_EX.MERAKI_FLAG,'N') AS MERAKI_FLAG
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DTM
FROM 
(
SELECT
 SNRALD.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
,SNRALD.GLOBAL_NAME
,SNRALD.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID
,SNRALD.ADJUSTMENT_ID
,SNRALD.BATCH_SOURCE
,SNRALD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,SNRALD.CURRENCY_CODE
,SNRALD.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SNRALD.DIST_BAL_TYPE
,SNRALD.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE
,SNRALD.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
,SNRALD.AMOUNT 
,SNRALD.PERCENT_ADJ
,SNRALD.EVENT_ID
,SNRALD.GL_DATE
,SNRALD.GL_POSTED_DATE
,SNRALD.GL_POSTED_FLAG
,SNRALD.LEDGER_ID
,SNRALD.LINE_ID
,SNRALD.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
,SNRALD.OA_SKU_TYPE
,SNRALD.ORG_ID
,SNRALD.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID
,SNRALD.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME
,SNRALD.TSV_FLAG
,SNRALD.UNIQUE_ID
,SNRALD.APPLICATION_ID
,SNRALD.EVENT_TYPE
,SNRALD.ACCOUNT_CLASS
,SNRALD.MERAKI_FLAG
FROM $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS SNRALD
WHERE  EVENT_TYPE ='TBA_DEFERRAL' 
 AND ( OA_SKU_TYPE = 'SUB' OR OA_SKU_TYPE IS NULL ) 
 AND ACCOUNT_CLASS IN ( 'UNEARNED_REVENUE' , 'REVENUE' )
 AND GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
 AND COALESCE(GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y' 
UNION ALL
SELECT
 ERXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
, ERXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME
, ERXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID
, ERXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_ID
, ERXRNR.BATCH_SOURCE
, ERXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
, ERXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE
, ERXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
, ERXRNR.DIST_BAL_TYPE
, ERXRNR.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE
, ERXRNR.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
, ERXRNR.AMOUNT 
, ERXRNR.PERCENT_ADJ
, ERXRNR.EVENT_ID
, ERXRNR.GL_DATE
, ERXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE
, ERXRNR.GL_POSTED_FLAG
, ERXRNR.LEDGER_ID
, ERXRNR.LINE_ID
, ERXRNR.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
, ERXRNR.OA_SKU_TYPE
, ERXRNR.ORG_ID
, ERXRNR.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID
, ERXRNR.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME
, ERXRNR.TSV_FLAG
, ERXRNR.UNIQUE_ID
, ERXRNR.APPLICATION_ID
, ERXRNR.EVENT_TYPE
, ERXRNR.ACCOUNT_CLASS
,ERXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE ERXRNR
WHERE  EVENT_TYPE ='TBA_DEFERRAL' 
 AND ( OA_SKU_TYPE = 'SUB' OR OA_SKU_TYPE IS NULL ) 
 AND ACCOUNT_CLASS IN ( 'UNEARNED_REVENUE' , 'REVENUE' )
 AND GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
 AND COALESCE(GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'  
)ST_EX
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER   GL
  ON ST_EX.LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON ST_EX.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT SRA 
  ON  ST_EX.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT 
  AND SRA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
  ON    NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY   
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EL 
WHERE ST_EX.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID=EL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND ST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME=EL.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT
ST.BATCH_ID                      
,ST.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
,ST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT              
,ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
,ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
,ST.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
,ST.ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY           
,ST.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
,ST.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
,ST.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
,ST.ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE          
,ST.ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT            
,ST.AE_HEADER_ID                  
,ST.AE_LINE_NUM                   
,ST.AMOUNT                        
,ST.APPLICATION_ID                
,ST.ASSOCIATION_TYPE              
,ST.BATCH_SOURCE                  
,ST.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,ST.BOOKING_PERCENT               
,ST.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,ST.COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
,ST.COGS_REV_GL_DATE              
,ST.COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
,ST.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS         
,ST.CONVERSION_TYPE               
,ST.CREATED_BY                    
,ST.CREATION_DATE                 
,ST.CURRENCY_CODE                 
,ST.CURRENCY_PRECISION            
,ST.CUSTOMER_NAME                 
,ST.CUSTOMER_NUMBER               
,ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,ST.DESTINATION_BATCH_ID          
,ST.DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME        
,ST.DIST_BAL_TYPE                 
,ST.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
,ST.EDW_EXTRACTED_FLAG            
,ST.EVENT_ID                      
,ST.EVENT_TYPE                    
,ST.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,ST.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,ST.GL_DATE                       
,ST.GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
,ST.GL_POSTED_DATE                
,ST.GL_POSTED_FLAG                
,ST.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,ST.GROUPING_ID                   
,ST.HEADER_ID                     
,ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,ST.INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,ST.INVOICE_TYPE                  
,ST.JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
,ST.JE_SOURCE_NAME                
,ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,ST.LEDGER_ID                     
,ST.LINE_COGS_AMOUNT              
,ST.LINE_ID                       
,ST.LINE_TYPE        
,ST.MERAKI_FLAG             
,ST.OA_SKU_TYPE                   
,ST.ORDER_NUMBER                  
,ST.ORG_ID                        
,ST.PERCENT_ADJ                   
,ST.PERIOD_NAME                   
,ST.PROCESS_ID                    
,ST.PROFILE_ID                    
,ST.RAO_CREATED_BY                
,ST.RAO_CREATION_DATE             
,ST.RAO_LAST_UPDATE_DATE          
,ST.RAO_LAST_UPDATED_BY           
,ST.RECOGNIZED_BOOKING_PCT        
,ST.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID            
,ST.SEGMENT1                      
,ST.SEGMENT10                     
,ST.SEGMENT2                      
,ST.SEGMENT3                      
,ST.SEGMENT4                      
,ST.SEGMENT5                      
,ST.SEGMENT6                      
,ST.SEGMENT7                      
,ST.SEGMENT8                      
,ST.SEGMENT9                      
,ST.SOURCE_BATCH_ID               
,ST.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME             
,ST.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5              
,ST.SUMMARY_ID                    
,ST.TRX_CLASS                     
,ST.TRX_DATE                      
,ST.TRX_NUMBER                    
,ST.TSV_FLAG                      
,ST.UNIQUE_ID                     
,ST.USD_CONV_RATE                 
,ST.WEBEX_FLAG                    
,ST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME            
,ST.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,ST.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS ST
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER   GL
  ON ST.LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON ST.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE' 
WHERE  EVENT_TYPE ='TBA_DEFERRAL' 
 AND ( OA_SKU_TYPE = 'SUB' OR ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID IS NULL ) 
 AND ACCOUNT_CLASS IN ( 'UNEARNED_REVENUE' , 'REVENUE' )
 AND ST.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
 AND COALESCE(ST.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y' 
 AND NOT EXISTS /* can use not exists on EL Table as well */
 (SELECT 1 FROM 
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
   $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT SRA ,
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
  WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = ST.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND ST.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT 
   AND SRA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   AND NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
  )
